name: CLIP Corporation
summary: CLIP Corporation engages in the education and sports businesses in Japan. It is involved in the management of cram school for elementary and junior high school students; soccer classes for infants and elementary school lower grades; Yuasa football club; dance school for young and third graders; and basket school for infants and elementary schools. The company also engages in the home delivery of lunch; agricultural; development of osteopathic and manipulative clinics; management of a yakiniku restaurant; and residential land and building transaction businesses. In addition, it sells plant mineral water; and leases real estate properties. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
